case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER & TAX VS. FARHAD BEEKZAD

docket_entries.description: REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 2/16/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-13-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-05-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, REPRESENTED BY SARAH HEYWORTH, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
